seoTitle: Aipu News and Updates - Product Releases and Industry Information | BeiLuo Distributor
seoDescription: Latest news from Aipu Electronics: product releases, technical updates, industry trends. Learn about the latest developments and application cases of Aipu power modules.

faqs.question: How to get the latest Aipu product information?
faqs.answer: Ways to get the latest Aipu product information: 1) Official website: Visit Aipu Electronics official website for latest product release information; 2) BeiLuo website: Follow our Aipu brand section for latest product news; 3) Email subscription: Subscribe to our product newsletter for first-hand new product information; 4) Social media: Follow Aipu official social media accounts; 5) Sales contact: Contact our sales team for latest product catalogs. We regularly release new products, product upgrades, and technical updates to help customers learn about the latest power supply solutions.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to our email newsletter or follow the official website for latest product information.

faqs.question: What are the important technical updates from Aipu?
faqs.answer: Aipu Electronics continues technical innovation and product upgrades: 1) High efficiency technology: New generation products improve efficiency by 2-5%, reducing power consumption and heat generation; 2) Miniaturization design: Advanced packaging technology reduces product size by 20-30%; 3) Wide temperature technology: Extended operating temperature range, some products support -40~105°C; 4) Low ripple technology: Optimized filter design reduces output ripple by 50%; 5) Intelligent functions: Added remote monitoring, fault diagnosis and other smart functions; 6) New material applications: New magnetic materials and semiconductor devices improve performance. Follow our technical news to learn about latest technical development trends.
faqs.decisionGuide: Follow our technical news to learn about Aipu's latest technical innovations.

articles.title: Aipu Electronics Releases New Generation High Efficiency DC-DC Power Modules
articles.author: BeiLuo Marketing
articles.summary: Aipu Electronics launches new generation high efficiency DC-DC power module series, with efficiency improved to 88%, size reduced by 25%, providing better power supply solutions for industrial automation and communication equipment.
articles.content: Aipu Electronics recently released a new generation of high efficiency DC-DC power module series, including fixed input, wide input, and non-isolated three major series. The new products adopt advanced topology structures and optimized magnetic component design, achieving significant efficiency improvements.
highlights: Efficiency improved to 88%, 3-5% higher than previous generation
Size reduced by 25%, saving valuable PCB space
Ripple noise reduced by 50%, better output quality
Operating temperature range extended to -40~105°C
Added short circuit protection and overtemperature protection functions
articles.seoTitle: Aipu New Generation High Efficiency DC-DC Power Module Release | BeiLuo Distributor
articles.seoDescription: Aipu Electronics releases new generation high efficiency DC-DC power modules, efficiency improved to 88%, size reduced by 25%, providing better solutions for industrial and communication applications.

articles.title: Aipu Power Modules Successfully Applied in Intelligent Manufacturing
articles.author: BeiLuo FAE Team
articles.summary: A well-known intelligent manufacturing enterprise adopted Aipu power module solution, successfully achieving localization replacement of PLC control system, reducing costs by 40%, with reliability reaching international levels.
articles.content: Recently, a well-known intelligent manufacturing enterprise completed the localization upgrade of its PLC control system, adopting Aipu Electronics power module solution to replace original imported products, achieving significant results.
highlights: Successfully replaced imported brands, achieving localization
Power supply section cost reduced by 40%
System reliability reached international advanced level
Delivery cycle shortened from 8 weeks to 2 weeks
Local technical support responds more timely
articles.seoTitle: Aipu Power Module Intelligent Manufacturing Application Case | BeiLuo Distributor
articles.seoDescription: Aipu power modules successfully applied in intelligent manufacturing, helping customers achieve PLC control system localization, cost reduced by 40%, reliability reaching international levels.

articles.title: Aipu Power Modules Pass Multiple International Certification Updates
articles.author: BeiLuo Quality Department
articles.summary: Aipu Electronics multiple power module products completed UL, CE, RoHS and other international certification updates, meeting latest regulatory requirements, helping customers export products to global markets.
articles.content: Aipu Electronics recently announced that multiple DC-DC and AC-DC power module products have completed international certification updates, including important certifications such as UL, CE, and RoHS.
highlights: UL certification updated to latest standards
CE certification complies with EU 2019/1782 energy efficiency regulations
RoHS certification meets latest hazardous substance restriction requirements
Added medical grade product IEC 60601-1 certification
Certification scope extended to full product series
articles.seoTitle: Aipu Power Module International Certification Update | BeiLuo Distributor
articles.seoDescription: Aipu power modules pass UL, CE, RoHS international certification updates, meeting latest regulatory requirements, helping customers export products to global markets.

articles.title: BeiLuo and Aipu Jointly Hold Power Supply Design Technical Seminar
articles.author: BeiLuo Marketing
articles.summary: BeiLuo and Aipu Electronics jointly held power module design technical seminar, sharing practical techniques on power supply selection, thermal design, EMC design, helping engineers improve design capabilities.
articles.content: Recently, BeiLuo and authorized distributor brand Aipu Electronics jointly held a power module design technical seminar, attracting over one hundred engineers from industrial automation, communication equipment, instrumentation and other fields.
highlights: Power module selection techniques sharing
Thermal design and heat dissipation solutions explanation
EMC design key points and case analysis
Live demonstrations and hands-on experiments
One-on-one FAE technical consultation

articles.author: BeiLuo Marketing
articles.summary: With excellent product quality and outstanding technical support, Aipu Electronics won the 2023 Excellent Supplier Award from multiple well-known enterprises, demonstrating the strength of domestic power module brands.

articles.title: Aipu Electronics Expands Production to Meet Market Demand Growth
articles.author: BeiLuo Marketing
articles.summary: In response to market demand growth brought by the domestic substitution trend, Aipu Electronics invested in expanding manufacturing lines, increasing production capacity by 50%, ensuring timely delivery of customer orders.
articles.content: With the acceleration of the domestic substitution trend, Aipu Electronics power module market demand continues to grow. To meet customer needs, Aipu Electronics recently completed the expansion of manufacturing lines.
highlights: Production capacity increased by 50%, monthly capacity reached 5 million units
Added 3 automated manufacturing lines
Introduced advanced testing equipment
Expanded quality management team
Standard product lead time shortened to 2 weeks
articles.seoTitle: Aipu Electronics Expands Production to Meet Market Demand | BeiLuo Distributor
articles.seoDescription: Aipu Electronics invests in expanding manufacturing lines, production capacity increased by 50%, meeting market demand growth from domestic substitution trend, ensuring timely delivery.
